description: pipeline/schema.py's RAW_ORDERS schema no longer matches data/orders.csv: it requires a new 'channel' column that doesn't exist in the raw data, and expects 'amount' to be int instead of float. transform() fails at RAW_ORDERS.validate() with a pandera SchemaError.
fix_hint: Align RAW_ORDERS in pipeline/schema.py back to the actual columns/types produced by data/orders.csv (drop 'channel', restore 'amount' to float).
